conditions.physical_address: Institute of Organic Chemistry, University of Graz, A-8010 Graz, Heinrichstrasse 28, Austria
conditions.evidence_text: Critical conditions for PEG were found at a mobile phase composition of MeOH:H20 80:20, which allowed a good separation of PPG.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: critical conditions for PEG were found at a mobile phase composition of MeOH:H20 80:20, which allowed a good separation of PPG.
conditions.notes: Under these conditions, elution volumes of diols, mono- and dimethylethers are quite similar, indicating independence from chain length for the PEG block.
